mapper.insert: insert into comment (content_id, parent_id, comment_text, anonymous_id, like_count, comment_status, create_time) values (#{contentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{commentText}, #{anonymousId}, #{likeCount}, #{commentStatus}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.content_id, c.parent_id, c.comment_text, c.anonymous_id, u.avatar, c.like_count, c.comment_status, c.create_time from comment c left join user u on c.anonymous_id = u.anonymous_id where c.content_id = #{contentId} order by c.create_time desc

select c.id, c.content_id, c.parent_id, c.comment_text, c.anonymous_id, u.avatar, c.like_count, c.comment_status, c.create_time from comment c left join user u on c.anonymous_id = u.anonymous_id where c.anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} order by c.create_time desc

select c.id, c.content_id, c.parent_id, c.comment_text, c.anonymous_id, u.avatar, c.like_count, c.comment_status, c.create_time from comment c left join user u on c.anonymous_id = u.anonymous_id where c.parent_id = #{parentId} order by c.create_time asc
mapper.update: update comment set comment_status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update comment set like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count + #{likeNum}) where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select comment_status as status, count(*) as count, sum(like_count) as totalLikes from comment group by comment_status order by comment_status
mapper.update: update comment set comment_status = #{status} where anonymous_id = #{anonymousId}
